title: Inbound SIP Routing
lede: Point one or more of your phone numbers at a group so that incoming calls to those numbers ring the group's online members. This is how a team starts receiving live inbound calls.

steps.title: Open the Inbound SIP Routing tab
steps.content:
1. Go to Call Center → Contact Center → Groups and select a group.
  2. Open the Inbound SIP Routing tab.

images.caption: Inbound SIP Routing: turn it on and pick the numbers that ring this group.
Inbound SIP Routing: turn it on and pick the numbers that ring this group.

steps.title: Turn inbound routing on
steps.content: Toggle the switch in the Inbound SIP calls to this group card to on. When on, calls to the numbers you choose ring every online member at once (first to answer wins). When off, this group ignores those numbers and your AI answers as usual.

steps.title: Choose the phone numbers
steps.content:
1. In Associated inbound numbers, select one or more of your account's phone numbers.
  2. Incoming calls to any of these numbers will ring this group's online members.

If the list is empty, you don't have any phone numbers yet — add one first (see below).

steps.title: Save
steps.content: Click Save. Test by calling one of the assigned numbers — online members' web dialers should ring. If nobody answers within the ring window, the call follows the fallback you set on the Ring strategy tab.

nextSteps.title: What's Next?
nextSteps.description: Control how the group rings and what happens when no one answers.

cards.title: Ring Strategy
cards.description: Ring all at once or one at a time, then fall back to AI.

cards.title: Add a Phone Number
cards.description: Get a number to route to this group.

cards.title: Queue Settings
cards.description: Hold callers when no agent is free.

metaDescription: Point a phone number or DID at a Contact Center group in iMash so inbound calls ring the group's online members, with an AI fallback when no one answers.
metaKeywords: inbound sip routing, phone number, did, ring group, contact center, permission group, inbound calls
